zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Matilda Stewart於1435年出生在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林時，她的父親James Seamus Mor Stewart -1st Of Baldorran45歲，母親Lady Anne MacDonald29歲。她於大約1453年與Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1458年在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾享年23歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特拉斯賀布藍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Matilda Stewart于1435年出生在英国苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林时，她的父亲James Seamus Mor Stewart -1st Of Baldorran45岁，母亲Lady Anne MacDonald29岁。她于大约1453年与Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1458年在英国苏格兰斯林史爾享年23岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰斯林史爾斯特拉斯賀布藍。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Matilda Stewart was born in 1435, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, James Seamus Mor Stewart -1st Of Baldorran, was 45 and her mother, Lady Anne MacDonald, was 29. She married Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath about 1453. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1458, in Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 23, and was buried in Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Matilda Stewart est née en 1435, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Seamus Mor Stewart -1st Of Baldorran, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne MacDonald, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath environ 1453. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1458, à Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 23 ans, et a été enterrée à Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Matilda Stewart 1435 in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Seamus Mor Stewart -1st Of Baldorran 45 und ihre Mutter Lady Anne MacDonald 29. Sie hat um 1453 Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1458 im Alter von 23 Jahren in Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Matilda Stewart è nata il nel 1435 nel Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, James Seamus Mor Stewart -1st Of Baldorran, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Lady Anne MacDonald, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath circa 1453. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1458, nel Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 23 anni, e fu sepolta a Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Matilda Stewartが1435年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングで生まれた時，父James Seamus Mor Stewart -1st Of Baldorranは45歳，母Lady Anne MacDonaldは29歳であった。約1453年にSir William Edmonstone Of Duntreathと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1458年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアで23歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアストラスブランにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Matilda Stewart(이)가 1435년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Seamus Mor Stewart -1st Of Baldorran(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne MacDonald(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1453년 Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1458년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르에서 23세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스트래스블랜에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Matilda Stewart nasceu em 1435, em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, James Seamus Mor Stewart -1st Of Baldorran, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne MacDonald, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath aproximadamente 1453. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1458, em Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 23 anos, e foi sepultada em Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Matilda Stewart родилась в 1435 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Seamus Mor Stewart -1st Of Baldorran было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne MacDonald, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath около 1453 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1458 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 23 лет и была похоронена в местности стратблан, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath aproximadamente 1453. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1458, en Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 23 años, y fue sepultada en Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
